message:
feat: add health check configuration and state management (rust_proxy-b5m.1, rust_proxy-b5m.2)

Configuration changes (rust_proxy-b5m.1):
- Add health check settings to Settings struct:
  - health_check_enabled, health_check_interval_secs, health_check_timeout_ms
  - consecutive_failures_threshold, auto_failover, auto_failback, failback_delay_secs
- Add priority and health_check_url fields to ProxyConfig
- Update Default implementations with sensible defaults

State management changes (rust_proxy-b5m.2):
- Add HealthStatus enum (Unknown, Healthy, Degraded, Unhealthy)
- Extend ProxyStats with health tracking fields:
  - health_status, consecutive_failures, last_health_check
  - last_healthy, last_failure_reason
- Add StateStore methods:
  - record_health_check(): Track health check results with threshold logic
  - get_health_status(): Query current health of a proxy
  - get_healthy_proxies(): Get list of healthy proxy IDs
  - get_all_stats(): Get all proxy statistics

All 62 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
